creator: rz-rpi03@h-ka.de
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #12)
> At the db> prompt, run "show ktr".  Please save the output and post it here.

I will try it, but usually after the panic occured I can not input anything
via the USB keyboard. So I will not be able to run "show ktr" execpt there
is some kind of automatically running "show ktr" at the db> prompt in case
of a panic.

Ralf
